title: Lucid Group Inc Announces Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Lucid announced Q3 2024 financial results with revenue of $200 million, representing strong year-over-year growth from $137.8 million in Q3 2023. The company produced and delivered strong vehicle numbers as production ramp continued. However, net loss widened to $992.5 million, reflecting continued operating losses despite revenue growth. The company reaffirmed its 2024 guidance to produce approximately 9,000 vehicles and highlighted progress on the Gravity SUV launch set for late 2024. Management emphasized cost reduction initiatives and margin improvement strategies. The results demonstrated the classic EV startup challenge: strong production growth coupled with expanding absolute losses reflecting the low margin environment and high operating expenses.
